# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?
<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New playbook
- [ ] Fix to existing agent or playbook
- [ ] Tooling / scripts / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] Agent frontmatter has `name`, `description`, and `color`
- [ ] Content passes `scripts/lint-agents.sh`
- [ ] Follows the 90/10 value rule -- no more than one subtle reference to Cletrics per agent, and only when directly relevant
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or customer data
- [ ] No destructive or exfiltrating instructions to downstream coding agents
